response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy experience, or director-level technical leadership at scale — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Demonstrated open-source AI-agent and infrastructure tooling contributions (e.g., MCP code generators)
Proven full-stack versatility across languages, platforms, and domains including cloud (AWS CDK) and real-time systems
Strong track record of technical mentorship, workshops, and community leadership in software engineering
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading AI-powered platforms or products with measurable impact
Lacks documented experience in cloud product strategy or advising enterprise customers on AI adoption
Education is a BS in CS; no advanced degree in AI or related field as preferred qualification
